products.name: ATI320
products.descriptor: Compact 320×240 12µm LWIR microbolometer thermal imaging module

evidence.snippet:
ATI320
======
Ready to sense, Ready to image
[Download datasheet](/sites/default/files/2024-10/R1_ATI320_2025.pdf)
![](/sites/default/files/2024-11/LYNRED_Produits_Gabarit_Fiche.png)
*   320 x240
*   12µm
*   Microbolometer

**ATI320** is a compact-sized thermal imager, weighing only 7g and equipped with embedded shutterless image correction. This innovative design effectively meets the demanding requirements of compact camera needs.

unresolved_questions: All 15 product detail pages were skipped (status=skipped_class_budget); exact pixel formats, pitch sizes, and technology (MCT vs microbolometer) for ATTO/GALATEA/SEEGNUS/ARGO/ATI-prefixed products are inferred from naming conventions and listing context only — not confirmed from individual product pages.
No NDAA Section 848/889 or Blue UAS compliance language found anywhere in corpus; Lynred is a French company so NDAA status is not disclosed.
ATI EOLE MW product page was skipped; its relationship to the EOLE MW cooled detector (listed separately but not in the prioritized list) is not confirmed.
ATTO640D-04 vs ATTO640D-04W variant distinction (likely standard vs wide-format window) not confirmed from corpus.
